label.name: We continue with the second block, please do not m...
label.intro:
We continue with the second block, please do not miss the mini-video 🔥 and participate virtually in a conversation ☕ about learning from the first day 😓, getting by in the first classes, the trip and managing in a second language...

The conversation helps us to explain how we will accompany 🤹️ your exchange from the IRO, at the end of this section you will find the most frequently asked questions about the language training prior to the exchange and the OLS.

In this period (at the beginning of your exchange) you start to develop new skills 😎. We learn from day one by putting our skills into play in a context of cultural diversity and which requires losing the fear of expressing ourselves in another language.

We have created an itinerary to help you become aware of these new skills, but first access the mini-video 🔥 it's important!

If you have already watched the mini-video 🔥 the next step is to access the content that helps us think about cultural diversity and the global studies approach through different audio-visual resources. 

Finally, remember our proposal for the development of the personal exploration process 🕵️️ that will help you later on to defend the added value of a professional profile of someone who has participated in an exchange experience. Complex? Yes, but we assure you that when you have lived it everything makes sense.


Presentación del bloque (nota de voz, Spanish): Presentación Bloque 03
